'''Stranglethorn''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Plant/Legends|vine]] found on the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. When it first sprouted, stranglethorn was of little note.

However, over [[Time/Legends|time]], the stranglethorn grew into a large, [[Carnivorous plant/Legends|carnivorous plant]] with a bulbous head and sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. Unsuspecting [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] sometimes grew the plant only to learn of its [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] tendencies the hard way. Princess [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] made this mistake sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].
